title: Asmodeus (Book Of Angels Volume 7)
notes:
Packaged in a Digipak with a die-cut front cover and, around the spine, a black photo-illustrated obi that includes notes.

Marc Ribot plays Masada Book Two
Recorded and mixed February 28 and March 1, 2007 at Orange Studio, NJ

A Project of Hips Road
ⒸⓅ 2007 Tzadik

videos.description: Taken from The Book of Angels 7: Asmodeus, released on Zorn's Tzadik label. Every single BoA CD is a masterpiece and this here is no exception.
videos.title: Mark Ribot - Kalmiya HQ

videos.description:
Composed and conduced by John Zorn. Marc Ribot on guitar. Trevor Dunn in bass. G. Calvin Weston on drums. From the album Asmodeus: Book of Angels Volume 7 (2007).
